channel.title: Journey on thecyberquestor
channel.description: Recent content in Journey on thecyberquestor

item.title: my oscp journey
item.description:
my journey

A timeline of how I got from “what’s nmap” to OSCP+ certified. The full post is coming soon — it’s long and I want to do it justice.

the rough outline

  • Phase 1: The basics — Linux, networking, bash. No hacking yet.
  • Phase 2: First boxes — TryHackMe rooms, easy HTB machines, lots of pain
  • Phase 3: Structured prep — PWK course, PG Practice, methodology building
  • Phase 4: The grind — 3+ months of daily boxes, note-taking obsession
  • Phase 5: The exam — what actually happened
  • Phase 6: Reflection — what I’d keep, what I’d change

Full writeup coming — subscribe or follow on Medium to catch it.
